Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Karoshan queen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Queen Cynara commissioned the palace in Cana.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Queen Cynara is the original Ragnarus Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Queen Cynara made an ancient pact regarding who can enter the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — The second Queen Cynara sealed the Avernus Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Queen Cynara the First was enraged at the Elysian Incarnation's manipulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Queen Cynara is also known as the First of her name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Cynara the First was the Queen of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Queen Cynara launched a red wooden javelin at Helgard.}}

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — The Karoshan queen is a towering figure with great power.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
